title: His Children and Wives
description: i. Ruqayyah and Umm Kulthum, both daughters of the Messenger of God. Ruqayyah bore him 'Abdallah. 130561 2. Fakhitah bt. Ghazwan b. Jabir b. Nusayb b. Wuhayb b. Zayd b. Malik b. 'Abd [sic] b. 'Awf b. al-Harith b. Mazin b. Man$ur b. 'Ikrimah b. Kha$afah b. Qays b. 'Aylan b. Mu4ar. She bore him a son and he named him 'Abdallah-that is, 'Abdallah the Younger (a1-A$ghar), who died at an early age. 3. Umm 'Amr bt. Jundab b. 'Amr b. Humamah b. al-Harith b. Rifa'ah b. Sa'd b. Tha'labah b. Lu'ayy b. 'Amin b. Ghanm b. Duhman b. Munhib b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
